description.value:
Benefit: To find the trail of an individual or to follow it for 1 hour requires a Gather Information check. The DC of the check and the number of checks required depends on the community population (DC 5 for fewer than 2,000 people up to DC 30 for 500,000+). You must make another Gather Information check every hour of the search, as well as each time the trail becomes difficult to follow.

Special: You can cut the time per Gather Information check in half (to 30 minutes), but you suffer a -5 penalty on the check.
